title: Baseline flicker reproduction and boundaries
problem: 用户反馈 Web 端点击很多按钮会屏幕闪烁、使用不流畅；需要先把它作为体验专项，而不是混入功能开发。
scope: 只读复核 Web production preview 下的 Settings、Scope、Recent Assets、资产筛选、Select/Reject、模式切换；记录可复现路径和当前请求/重渲染表现。
acceptance: 形成明确基线：哪些操作会闪、是否出现空列表/unauthorized 瞬闪、是否触发重复 /api/admin/assets/recent 请求；不运行真实 provider，不读取/打印 key。
verification: production preview 手测；浏览器 Network/Performance/React Profiler；npm test/build 基线。
evidence: 2026-06-21 baseline refined from code review and subagent audit: highest-risk flicker paths are ServerAssetLibrary full settings subscription, refresh/error setAssets([]), incomplete scope invalidation, and per-character filter requests. Browser automation was attempted but blocked by tool sandbox metadata error; verified with tests/build and local HTTP health only.

title: Decouple asset library from unrelated settings
problem: ServerAssetLibrary 订阅整个 settings，任意设置变更都可能重算 auth/scope 并触发资产库刷新。
scope: 收窄 Web 资产库订阅范围，只订阅 API base、auth、Admin session、workspace/project/campaign 和资产库相关筛选；非资产库设置变化不得触发资产列表重拉。
acceptance: 修改非 scope 设置、打开/关闭 Settings、切换非资产库配置时，不触发 /api/admin/assets/recent 或当前 scope assets 请求；资产列表不闪空。
verification: 前端单测覆盖 settings 变化不重拉；浏览器 Network 验证；npm --prefix web test -- --run；npm --prefix web run build。
evidence: 2026-06-21 ServerAssetLibrary now subscribes only to imageflowApiBaseUrl/imageflowApiKey/basic auth/workspace/project/campaign plus local filters instead of the whole settings object; npm --prefix web test -- --run passed 17 files/224 tests; npm --prefix web run build passed with existing chunk warning.

title: Keep existing assets while refreshing
problem: 当前刷新或 scope 不完整时可能 setAssets([])，导致用户看到列表闪空或 0 shown。
scope: 资产库刷新时保留旧内容，使用 loading overlay/status bar；只有新请求成功且确认为空时再显示空态；unauthorized/error 不清空已有可见资产。
acceptance: scope 切换、筛选、登录恢复时不出现旧列表瞬间清空；401 显示明确状态但不误导成真实空列表。
verification: Web component tests；浏览器手测 Recent Assets、Scope 切换、filter no result、unauthorized。
evidence: 2026-06-21 replace refresh/error no longer clears existing assets; incomplete scope cancels stale requests without wiping the visible list; refresh with existing assets shows a stable status banner; confirmed by web tests/build. Browser visual verification remains pending because browser plugin failed to attach in this session.

title: Atomic scope switching
problem: Settings/Scope 管理可能把 workspace/project/campaign 分步写入全局 store，造成空 scope -> 自动补齐 -> 再刷新。
scope: Scope 选择先在本地 draft 中完成，只有 workspace/project/campaign 完整后一次性提交；避免把 projectId/campaignId 临时写空。
acceptance: 从资产卡 Scope、Scope 管理 modal、Settings scope selector 切换时，资产库最多一次有效刷新，不出现空 scope 闪烁。
verification: 前端测试覆盖 scope submit；Network 验证请求次数；浏览器手测。
evidence: 2026-06-21 completed: SettingsModal managed scope selector now keeps incomplete workspace/project/campaign in local draft, commits only complete scope, preserves previous complete scope on close, and create workspace/project no longer writes empty descendants globally; ScopeManager set-current writes only imageflowManagedMode/workspace/project/campaign partial. Verified with npm --prefix web test -- --run (17 files/224 tests) and npm --prefix web run build (existing chunk warning only). Browser visual Network verification was closed by P1-UX-009.

title: Debounce and cancel asset filters
problem: keyword/source/session/batch 输入每个字符都可能请求，造成请求风暴和界面抖动。
scope: 对文本筛选加 300ms debounce，并用 AbortController 或请求序号取消/忽略旧请求；select/status 类离散筛选可立即触发。
acceptance: 连续输入 5 个字符最多产生 1 个最终有效资产请求；旧请求返回不会覆盖新结果。
verification: 前端单测 fake timers；浏览器 Network 验证；npm test/build。
evidence: 2026-06-21 text filters now use draftFilters with 300ms debounce before applying query filters; status remains immediate; requestRef cancels/ignores stale responses when newer loads start or scope becomes incomplete; npm --prefix web test -- --run and npm --prefix web run build passed.

title: Scope dashboard stats background loading
problem: ScopeManagerModal 打开时加载 dashboard stats，且统计可能逐 campaign 拉资产，交互期容易拖慢。
scope: 打开 modal 先渲染层级列表，统计在后台加载；统计请求限流/缓存，不阻塞点击和切换；避免无分页拉大资产列表。
acceptance: Scope modal 首次打开无明显空白；快速点击 workspace/project/campaign 不等待统计完成；统计失败不影响 scope 切换。
verification: 浏览器 Performance；组件测试或 mock API 测试；npm test/build。
evidence: 2026-06-21 completed: ScopeManagerModal now separates hierarchy request cancellation from dashboard stats request cancellation, delays dashboard stats startup by 180ms after hierarchy render, cancels/ignores stale stats on close/reload, keeps existing 60s cache, and passes explicit asset list limit=24 for stats scans. Verified npm --prefix web test -- --run (17 files/224 tests), npm --prefix web run build (existing >500k chunk warning only), git diff --check, and production preview HTTP 200. Browser visual Network/Performance regression was closed by P1-UX-009.

title: Stable lazy modal fallback and preload
problem: Settings/Scope/Detail lazy fallback 为空，首次打开大 modal 或切换时可能出现短暂空帧。
scope: 给 lazy modal 提供稳定 overlay/skeleton fallback；对常用设置/Scope 入口在 hover/pointerdown 时预加载 chunk。
acceptance: 首次打开 Settings/Scope/Detail 不出现整屏空白；fallback 尺寸稳定，不造成布局跳。
verification: 浏览器手测 production preview；npm build chunk 检查；移动端窄屏检查。
evidence: 2026-06-21 completed: App lazy Suspense fallback is no longer null for AgentWorkspace/Detail/Lightbox/Settings/ScopeManager/MaskEditor; added stable overlay/skeleton shells and shared lazy module preload helpers. Header Settings/Scope/Agent tabs, TaskGrid/AgentWorkspace task cards, InputBar image overlays, mask editor path, and no-config submit path now preload relevant chunks on hover/focus/pointerdown. Verified npm --prefix web test -- --run (17 files/224 tests), npm --prefix web run build (lazy chunks still split; existing >500k warning only), git diff --check, and production preview HTTP 200. Full visual Network/Performance regression was closed by P1-UX-009.

title: Task and asset card render containment
problem: Select/Reject 或 task 更新会替换整个 tasks 数组，可能让 TaskGrid/资产卡大面积重绘。
scope: 对 TaskCard/资产卡做必要 memo 化和局部更新；确保单个资产 select/reject 不导致整页大量卡片重绘。
acceptance: React Profiler 显示单个 select/reject 主要影响目标卡片和必要摘要；长列表无明显闪烁。
verification: React Profiler；前端测试；生产预览手测。
evidence: 2026-06-21 completed: TaskCard now exports React.memo and subscribes only to settings.alwaysShowRetryButton instead of the whole settings object; TaskGrid wraps each visible task in memoized TaskGridItem with stable per-card handlers; ServerAssetLibrary now renders memoized ServerAssetCard and uses stable select/reject/copy/scope callbacks so action busy state primarily affects the target asset card. Verified npm --prefix web test -- --run (17 files/224 tests), npm --prefix web run build (existing >500k chunk warning only), git diff --check, and production preview HTTP 200. Browser Profiler/Network evidence was closed by P1-UX-009.

title: UX smoothness regression and docs
problem: 体验专项完成后需要把证据写回项目管理，避免之后功能开发再次引入闪烁。
scope: 回归 Settings、Scope、Recent Assets、筛选、Select/Reject、Project Context 面板入口；更新 TASKS、PROJECT_STATUS_MAP、PROJECT_PLAN、CHECKPOINTS、RUNBOOK 和本 CSV evidence。
acceptance: 核心操作无明显屏幕闪烁；非相关设置不重拉资产；筛选请求受控；文档记录验收方式和已知剩余风险。
verification: npm --prefix web test -- --run；npm --prefix web run build；production preview 手测；Network/Profiler 摘要。
evidence: 2026-06-21 completed: npm --prefix web test -- --run passed 17 files/224 tests; npm --prefix web run build passed with existing chunk warning only; git diff --check passed; production preview HTTP 200. Browser regression via agent-browser-cli on http://127.0.0.1:4173 confirmed root and server asset library visible; opening Settings kept root visible and produced 0 /api/* entries; opening Scope Manager kept root visible and initially observed only /api/workspaces; Recent + Sync kept root/library visible and produced 1 recent request. Current browser state showed explicit unauthorized for Recent Assets, consistent with Admin session/API host mismatch rather than a render blank. No real provider run and no API/provider keys or secrets read/printed.
